name: Truckee Ski and Snowboard Swap
description: Large community ski and snowboard swap at Steve Randall Community Recreation Center; public buy/sell with ~21% commission.

name: Tahoe XC Summer Gear and Bike Swap
description: Major fundraiser summer gear and bike swap supporting Tahoe XC youth programs; accepts bikes and human-powered summer outdoor gear.

name: Tahoe XC Cross-Country and Backcountry Ski Swap
description: Annual cross-country and backcountry ski swap fundraiser for TCCSEA youth programs at Tahoe XC.

name: NUTS New and Used Tahoe Sports
description: Tahoe City consignment shop for skis, boards, bikes, apparel, and outdoor gear — buy, sell, consign year-round.

name: Tahoe Gear Exchange
description: South Lake Tahoe used gear and consignment store for skis, snowboards, bikes, and outdoor equipment.

name: Once Upon A Child Roseville
description: Kids resale store in the Sacramento metro buying and selling gently used children's clothing, toys, and baby gear.
